bird.name: Samoan flycatcher
bird.summary: The Samoan flycatcher (Myiagra albiventris) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Samoa.

relations.subject: Samoan flycatcher
relations.evidence: Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, and rural gardens and is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Samoan flycatcher
relations.evidence: Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, and rural gardens and is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
